subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Today, each believer must arise to teach the Faith and speak of it to seekers. We must rescue the world of humanity from all dangers that threaten it and sacrifice our own comfort for our Divine Beloved.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز هر فردی باید قیام بتبلیغ نماید و زبان بتبلیغ بگشاید و این عالم بشر را
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement
